findings.title: huggingface/transformers
findings.description: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

findings.title: microsoft/BitNet
findings.description: Official inference framework for 1-bit LLMs

findings.title: sgl-project/sglang
findings.description: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.

findings.title: kvcache-ai/ktransformers
findings.description: A Flexible Framework for Experiencing Heterogeneous LLM Inference/Fine-tune Optimizations

findings.title: thu-pacman/chitu
findings.description: High-performance inference framework for large language models, focusing on efficiency, flexibility, and availability.

findings.title: ModelTC/LightLLM
findings.description: LightLLM is a Python-based LLM (Large Language Model) inference and serving framework, notable for its lightweight design, easy scalability, and high-speed performance.

findings.title: NVIDIA/Model-Optimizer
findings.description: A unified library of SOTA model optimization techniques like quantization, pruning, distillation, speculative decoding, etc. It compresses deep learning models for downstream deployment frameworks like TensorRT-LLM, TensorRT, vLLM, etc. to optimize inference speed.

findings.title: openvinotoolkit/nncf
findings.description: Neural Network Compression Framework for enhanced OpenVINO™ inference

findings.title: efeslab/Nanoflow
findings.description: A throughput-oriented high-performance serving framework for LLMs

findings.title: harleyszhang/llm_note
findings.description: LLM notes, including model inference, transformer model structure, and llm framework code analysis notes.

findings.title: MegEngine/InferLLM
findings.description: a lightweight LLM model inference framework

findings.title: microsoft/vidur
findings.description: A large-scale simulation framework for LLM inference

findings.title: TsinghuaC3I/MARTI
findings.description: A Framework for LLM-based Multi-Agent Reinforced Training and Inference

findings.title: harleyszhang/lite_llama
findings.description: A light llama-like llm inference framework based on the triton kernel.

findings.title: bentoml/llm-optimizer
findings.description: Benchmark and optimize LLM inference across frameworks with ease

findings.title: inclusionAI/asystem-awex
findings.description: A high-performance RL training-inference weight synchronization framework, designed to enable second-level parameter updates from training to inference in RL workflows

findings.title: antgroup/LLMOPT
findings.description: The LLMOPT project offers a comprehensive set of resources, including the model, dataset, training framework, and inference code, enabling users to fully utilize LLMOPT.

findings.title: jkanalakis/deep-recall
findings.description: Enterprise-grade memory framework for LLMs featuring GPU-optimized inference, vector storage, and automated scaling. Enables hyper-personalized responses through efficient context retrieval and integration.

findings.title: jd-opensource/xllm-service
findings.description: A flexible serving framework that delivers efficient and fault-tolerant LLM inference for clustered deployments.

findings.title: pan-x-c/EE-LLM
findings.description: EE-LLM is a framework for large-scale training and inference of early-exit (EE) large language models (LLMs).
